metadata.name: Add a Joint Owner to an Account

description: A customer wants to add their spouse as a joint owner with rights of survivorship to their checking account.

nodes.task_description: Explain the legal implications of joint ownership.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly explains that both owners have equal access and ownership of the funds.

nodes.task_description: Collect the new owner's personal information and verify their identity.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gathers and verifies the spouse's information.

nodes.task_description: Update the account titling to reflect the new joint ownership.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully adds the spouse as a joint owner on the account.
